response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong technical expertise in software engineering with 15+ years of experience and a diverse technical background. However, her resume lacks explicit AI/ML expertise, entrepreneurial experience, or clear evidence of building AI-powered products. Her recent work in AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not deeply established. The mismatch between her broad engineering experience and the AI-specific role requirements lowers her fit score.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with a proven track record in full-stack development across multiple languages and technologies
Strong leadership and mentorship through founding GISCollective and organizing tech workshops/talks
Recent experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators) at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit AI/ML academic background (no Master's/PhD in AI-related field)
Limited evidence of building and scaling AI-powered products or platforms
Entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is not clearly AI-focused
